blended.narrative: Bolton Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,324 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
